title: Assistant Store Manager - Barista - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Barista - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Barista is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Barista:
Barista is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barista!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
